# 🎓 Learnova Pull Request

## 📌 Related Issue
Closes #ISSUES_NUMBER

## 📝 Summary
Provide a brief, high-level summary of the problem addressed and what these changes accomplish.

## 🛠️ Changes Made
- [ ] Detail of Change 1
- [ ] Detail of Change 2
- [ ] Detail of Change 3

## 🧪 Verification & Testing
Please describe the verification process and test steps executed to validate your changes:

### 1. Automated Tests
- Run command: `npm run test` or `pnpm test` (Include details if tests were added/modified)
- Build check: `npm run build` or `pnpm build`

### 2. Manual Verification
- **Device / Viewport Testing**: Verified responsiveness on Mobile (e.g. Chrome Mobile) and Tablet viewports.
- **Accessibility Verification**: Tested tab-navigation and focus visibility.
- **Theme Testing**: Checked styling consistency in both Dark Mode and Light Mode.

## 📸 Screenshots / Media (If UI Changed)
*Add screenshots, GIFs, or Loom recordings here to demonstrate visual enhancements.*

## 🚀 Impact & Value
Explain why this contribution improves Learnova (e.g. optimizes performance, fixes a critical vulnerability, enhances UX, automates workflow pipelines).

---

## 📋 Submission Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the established coding guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review and sanity-checked my own code.
- [ ] My changes generate no new developer warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have verified the layout's mobile responsiveness.
- [ ] Keyboard accessibility and ARIA semantics are considered.
- [ ] No unrelated files or cosmetic-only formatting changes are included in this PR.
